---
title: "My Notes"
---

Welcome to My Notes, rendered from an [Obsidian](https://obsidian.md/) vault using [Quarto](https://quarto.org/).

- Browse all notes on the [Notes](listing.qmd) page
- Explore connections in the [Graph](graph.qmd) visualisation

::: {.callout-note}
These are **demo notes** that showcase template features. Replace them with your own content.
:::
